channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th May
item.description:
Cut back hedge to boundary 15mts approx Standard TM required with fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Upcut grass verge, 18th May
item.description:
Grass verge outside 34 Abbotswood Road GL3 4NZ has not but this year and is overgrown

item.title: There are some 4-6 potholes in close proximity, the largest seems to have a whote pait mark but it's obviously very old and worn. The largest pothole is very large, probably qualifies as tennis ball seep but it's more the fact that the spacing of the potholes is such that only a 4x4 can pass with any safety, 18th May
item.description:
Approx 1/4 mile beyond Little Colesbourne Farm, on way to Withington
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Work finished and cones still out for single lane, 18th May
item.description:
The work finished last week yet the lane Brockworth side of the lights is still coned off. As is the bus stop the Hucclecote side of the lights and the temporary bus stop is still there causing issues with the traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th May
item.description:
Cway pothole Permanent repair 530mmx430mmx68mm Road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th May
item.description:
Cway pothole Permanent repair 350mmx210mmx42mm Road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very poor repair to the road with a long stretch of raised surface of the infilling., 18th May
item.description:
We fully endorse the report below and add that when heavy vehicles travelling down Leckhampton Road drive over this area, significant vibrations are felt throughout our house (105 Leckhampton Road). Action scheduled Massive failure of previous repair by a contractor who should be brought back to rectify - particularly dangerous for cyclists as it runs for several meters Reported via desktop in the A pothole in road category anonymously at 21:43, Tuesday 28 April 2026 using FixMyStreet Pro Sent to Gloucestershire County Council less than a minute later. FixMyStreet ref: 9369881. As the pin. Completely obvious & a danger to drivers & cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Leckhampton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th May
item.description:
Cway pothole Permanent repair 400mmx400mmx49mm Road closure TM required 4 nsd (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
